name: Cross River Ventures Corp.
description: Cross River Ventures Corp. is a Canada-based gold exploration company focused on the acquisition and development of top-tier gold assets in premier mining districts. The company's project portfolio includes several highly prospective gold properties in the province of Ontario, Canada, such as the McVicar Lake Gold Project, the Uchi Belt properties, and the Dryden Area projects. Cross River is dedicated to creating shareholder value through systematic, modern exploration techniques and strategic project advancement.
